ask_limit_reached: You've used all {{count}} questions for this chart. Generate a new chart to ask more.
ask_error: Could not get an answer. Please try again.
ask_empty_heading: Ask up to {{count}} questions about your birth chart
ask_empty_example: e.g. "What does my ascendant say about career?"
reading_idle_body: Discover the Raj Yogas in your birth chart and what the next 2–3 years hold for you — completely free.
reading_error: Could not generate insights. Please try again.
reading_desc: Get a personalised AI-powered Vedic insight based on your exact planetary positions.
error_place_not_found: Place not found. Try a full city name.
error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
disclaimer: Predictions are based on Vedic astrology principles and are intended for guidance, self-reflection, and entertainment purposes only. They are not a substitute for professional medical, legal, financial, or psychological advice, and outcomes are not guaranteed.
landing_headline: Your Birth Chart, Decoded by AI
landing_subhead: Ancient Vedic wisdom, calculated with modern precision — free, private, and ready in seconds.
landing_topics_heading: Or start with what's actually on your mind
landing_topic_career_question: Should I switch jobs? Is this the right time to start something of my own?
landing_topic_relationship_question: Will I get married soon? Is this relationship right for me?
landing_topic_health_question: What do the planets say about my energy and wellbeing?
landing_topic_finance_question: When will my financial situation turn around?
landing_footer_note: No signup needed for your first free Kundli.
landing_ai_subhead: Pick a question below — we'll answer it from your real chart once it's ready.
landing_ai_example_label: Example only — your answer comes from your actual chart
landing_ai_q_repeat_question: Why does this keep happening to me?
landing_ai_q_repeat_answer: This usually points to a repeating transit or dasha pattern — once we see your exact chart, we'll name which planet is behind it and when it eases.
landing_ai_q_dasha_question: Which planet is running my life right now?
landing_ai_q_dasha_answer: That's your current Mahadasha — the multi-year planetary period shaping your major decisions. We'll pinpoint yours from your birth time.
landing_ai_q_timing_question: Is this the right time for a big decision?
landing_ai_q_timing_answer: Timing comes down to your current dasha and any major transits crossing your chart right now. We'll check both before you decide.
landing_ai_tap_hint: Tap a question to see how we'd answer it
landing_ai_cta_start: Start my free reading with this question
landing_steps_heading: Three steps to your free reading
landing_step1_body: Name, date, time, and place — takes about a minute.
landing_step2_body: Swiss Ephemeris calculates exact planetary positions for the moment you were born.
landing_step3_body: View your charts, dashas, and a personalised reading right away — online or as a PDF.
landing_inside_subhead: Four sections, organised so you only see what's relevant to you
landing_inside_kundli_body: Birth chart, Navamsa, Dasha timeline, and planetary positions
landing_inside_advanced_body: Bhava Chalit, Ashtakavarga, and Sarvatobhadra for deeper study
landing_inside_insights_body: An AI reading focused on the area of life you chose
landing_inside_ask_body: Follow-up questions about your own chart, answered directly
landing_privacy_body: We use them only to calculate your chart and generate your reading — never sold, never shared.
landing_faq_a1: Yes — your birth chart, dasha timeline, planetary positions, and a free AI reading are all free, with no signup required. A few advanced reports are optional paid add-ons.
landing_faq_a2: Chart calculations use the Swiss Ephemeris, the same astronomical engine used by professional astrology software — accuracy depends only on how precise your birth time is.
landing_faq_q3: Do I need my exact birth time?
landing_faq_a3: It's optional, but it sharpens your results — your ascendant and house placements depend on exact birth time. Without it, we still calculate everything else accurately.
landing_faq_a4: Yes — switch between English and Hindi anytime using the toggle at the top of the page.
landing_faq_q5: What happens to my birth details?
landing_faq_a5: They're used only to calculate your chart and reading. We don't sell or share your personal data.
landing_final_cta_heading: Ready to see what your chart says?
landing_final_cta_body: Your first Kundli and AI reading are free — no signup needed.
topic_health_body: In Vedic astrology, your ascendant and Moon are the two strongest indicators of physical constitution and vitality. Your Lagna in {{lagna}} and Moon in {{moon}} ({{nakshatra}} nakshatra) shape how your energy naturally runs and how your body tends to recover from stress.
topic_relationship_body: Your Moon shapes your emotional needs in relationships, while Venus shows how you express affection and what draws you to a partner. Your Moon in {{moon}} paired with Venus in {{venus}} points to the kind of connection that genuinely nourishes you.
topic_finance_body: Wealth in Vedic astrology centers on accumulated resources, gains, and Jupiter — the natural significator of abundance. Your Jupiter in {{jupiter}} shows where prosperity tends to flow most naturally for you.
topic_coming_soon: A full personalized report — with specific yogas, timing, and remedies for this area — is coming soon.
topic_report_error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
topic_report_relationship_idle_body: A personalized relationship reading using your 7th house, Darakaraka, and D9 Navamsa chart — your natural relationship style, ideal partner energy, marriage timing, and remedies for harmony.
topic_report_finance_idle_body: A personalized financial reading using your 2nd house, 11th house, and D2 Hora chart — your natural wealth style, primary income path, financial timing, and remedies for abundance.
footer_newsletter_body: Free weekly predictions and astrology insights, straight to your inbox.
footer_newsletter_note: We respect your privacy. Unsubscribe anytime.
faq_page_q6: Is this AI or a real astrologer?
faq_page_a6: Today, readings are generated by AI grounded in our Vedic astrology reference library (Parashari, KP, and divisional-chart methodology). We're building a marketplace where you'll also be able to consult real, verified astrologers directly — that's coming soon.
faq_page_q7: Do you sell gemstones, rudraksha, or pujas?
faq_page_a7: Not yet. Our gemstone and remedy recommendations are informational, based on your chart. Any future marketplace for gemstones or puja booking will be clearly marked as a separate, optional service.
faq_page_q8: Can I generate a chart for a family member or child?
faq_page_a8: Yes — you can generate a chart for anyone whose birth details you have, including children, as their parent or guardian. See our Privacy Policy for how that information is handled.
faq_page_a9: Most features are currently free. Once paid reports or consultations launch, our Refund & Cancellation Policy explains exactly when a refund applies.
faq_page_q10: Is my birth data sent anywhere outside the app?
faq_page_a10: Your birth details are sent to the AI providers we use (Anthropic Claude and Groq) solely to generate your reading, and to OpenStreetMap for place lookup. Full detail is in our Privacy Policy.
login_subtitle: Use your phone number, email, or Google account.
login_google_failed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
login_disclaimer: We'll only use this to sign you in — never shared, never spammed.
login_seo_description: Sign in to Star Jyotish with your phone number, email, or Google account.
profile_membership_body: You're on the free plan. Paid plans aren't available yet — we'll let you know here as soon as they are.
profile_photo_hint: JPG or PNG, any size — resized automatically.
profile_photo_invalid_file: Please choose a valid image file.
profile_photo_too_large: That file is too large. Please choose a smaller photo.
testimonials_subhead: Early readers sharing what struck them
testimonial_1_text: I've consulted astrologers for years but never understood the reasoning. Seeing the actual chart and having the AI explain each placement changed everything. The career report nailed a tension I've been feeling for months.
testimonial_2_text: The Dasha timeline finally made sense to me. I knew I was in a Jupiter period but Star Jyotish showed me exactly how it was interacting with my natal chart. The Ask feature let me go deeper than any static report could.
testimonial_3_text: I was skeptical about AI and astrology together. But the reading was specific — it mentioned my Moon-Saturn square without me asking and connected it directly to patterns in my relationships. That's not generic.
testimonial_4_text: The Navamsa chart reading for my marriage question was impressively detailed. It picked up on the Venus placement and explained why it matters in D9 — in plain language, not jargon.
pricing_heading: Start free. Go deeper when you're ready.
pricing_subhead: Your full Kundli, Dasha timeline, and one AI reading are always free — no card needed.
pricing_faq_a1: Your full birth chart (all 16 divisional charts), Dasha timeline, Ashtakavarga, planetary positions, and one complete AI reading per chart — free, always, no account required.
pricing_faq_a2: Yes. Cancel from your account settings and you won't be charged again — your access continues until the period you paid for ends.
pricing_faq_q3: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing_faq_a3: UPI, all major debit and credit cards, and net banking — processed securely through Razorpay.
pricing_faq_a4: Yes. It's used only to calculate your chart and generate your reading. We don't share or sell personal data.
pricing_faq_a5: Yes — if you're unsatisfied within 7 days of a paid purchase, contact us and we'll refund in full.
blog_seo_desc: Practical guides to Vedic astrology — birth charts, Dasha timing, planetary placements, gemstone remedies. Clear explanations, not generic horoscopes.
blog_subhead: Practical guides to understanding your chart — written for people who want to actually learn, not just read predictions.
blog_empty: No articles in this category yet — check back soon.
blog_newsletter_body: One email when something worth reading goes live. No daily forecasts, no weekly predictions — just the articles.
home_seo_description: Your personal Vedic astrology workspace — chart, current Dasha, and guided learning, all in one calm place.
home_hero_subtext: Your journey through Vedic astrology continues.
home_snapshot_theme: A long Jupiter Mahadasha favors growth through learning, teaching, and steady expansion — the current Saturn Antardasha asks that growth stay disciplined and patient rather than rushed.
home_chart_time_approx_note: Birth time was approximate — house placements may shift slightly with the exact time.
home_chart_time_unknown_note: Birth time wasn't provided — shown using a default time, so the Ascendant and houses are approximate.
home_empty_title: Your journey is ready to begin
home_empty_body: A few gentle questions about your birth is all it takes. Then this space becomes truly yours — your Cosmic Snapshot, your chart, your path forward.
home_profile_selector_hint: Support for multiple profiles is coming soon
home_question_strongest-planet: What is the strongest planet in my chart?
home_question_current-dasha: What should I understand about my current Dasha?
home_question_ascendant-meaning: How should I interpret my Ascendant?
home_reflection_1: Where in your life are you currently being invited to grow?
home_reflection_2: What have you been putting off that quietly matters to you?
home_reflection_3: Where are you moving quickly, and where does patience actually serve you better?
home_reflection_4: What pattern keeps repeating in your life — and what might it be teaching you?
home_reflection_5: What would it look like to trust your own timing this week?
onboarding_seo_description: A few gentle questions about your birth, then your real Vedic birth chart.
onboarding_welcome_body: Before we begin your journey together, I'd like to know a little about your birth. This will only take about a minute.
onboarding_whose_title: Whose chart would you like to create?
onboarding_label_title_other: What should we call this profile?
onboarding_time_title: Do you know the birth time?
onboarding_time_approximate_note: An approximate time still helps — the Ascendant and house placements may shift slightly with the exact minute.
onboarding_time_unknown_note: That's perfectly fine. We'll calculate your planetary positions using a default time — everything except the Ascendant and houses stays accurate.
onboarding_complete_title: Your first Astrology Profile is ready
onboarding_complete_body: {{name}}'s chart has been prepared. This is the beginning of a much longer story.
